name: sylabys-syllabus-checker
description: Sylabys syllabus audit plugin. Aliases: @sylabys-syllabus-checker. This plugin exposes an MCP tool prepare_syllabus_audit that returns an exact orchestration plan. Codex must then spawn six real subagents for STR, FMT, OP, RUP, INT and TXT, wait for all, and write the human-readable Russian audit PDF. Do not invoke bundled skills.

interface.shortDescription: Audit syllabuses with a plugin tool and six Codex subagents.
interface.longDescription: Use @sylabys-syllabus-checker to audit a syllabus. The plugin exposes a callable MCP tool that prepares paths, commands and suite prompts; Codex then spawns six real subagents and generates final-report.pdf in Russian with corrections, evidence, levels of correction, literature notes, final-control form and exam questions.
defaultPrompt: Подготовь аудит силлабуса через Sylabys plugin
